title: Football ASCII Art ⚽ Copy & Paste
meta_description: Copy and paste football ASCII art — soccer ball, goal, and pitch characters plus ready-made one-line art for forums, Discord, and bios.
hero_tagline: Soccer ball, goal, and pitch characters plus ready-made one-line football art. Click any piece to copy it.
intro: Football ASCII art uses plain text characters to draw the game — round shapes for the ball, lines and boxes for the goal and pitch, and compact one-line pieces you can drop into forums, Discord, or a bio. Click any character or piece below to copy it, and combine them to build your own.

sections.label: Ball & Goal
sections.intro: Round and circular characters that read as a ball.

sections.label: Pitch & Net
sections.intro: Lines and boxes for building a goal, net, or pitch.

sections.label: Ready Art
sections.intro: Compact one-line pieces ready to paste.

related.title: Meme Text Art
related.desc: ASCII and text-art building blocks for memes and posts.

related.title: Football Symbols
related.desc: Soccer and football symbols, trophies, and match combos.

related.title: Sports Emojis
related.desc: Every sport and activity emoji, organized by category.

related.title: Soccer Emoji List
related.desc: The full soccer emoji set, ready to copy and paste.
